sections.paragraph:
λείπω [Skt. assoc.]

—1. tr. ‘cause to be deficient in someth’, pass. lack: in some aspect of personhood Js 1:4f; in material resources 2:15.

—2. intr. ‘be in a state of affairs requiring attention because of deficiency’, lack Tit 1:5; 3:13; in wordplay in a commercial context ἕν σοι λείπει one thing is lacking for you = one thing puts you in arrears Lk 18:22.
